title: agentic-stock-reporter
description: An agentic system to report and analyze stock market data.

title: get-shopee-price
description: A script to extract and monitor product prices from Shopee.

title: imexpharm-valuation-model
description: Conducted an in-depth financial analysis and estimated future growth potential using Advanced Excel and the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) method under various market scenarios.

title: macro-variables-gdp-per-capita
description: Analyzed the long-term impact of key macroeconomic variables on Australia's GDP per capita using econometric modeling and time-series data.
